sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55507" key="katafqe/ggw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταφθέγγω</orth>, <sense id="n55507.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sound loudly</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βροντήν, ἧς οὐδὲν -ει μεῖζον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2052.tlg001:1:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Horap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.29</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
